newsSince: Cohu's AI/HPC momentum continued through June: a second multi-unit order for next-generation AI chip testing, follow-on HPC orders, and an FY26 HPC revenue outlook of $80-100M against a ~$750M AI compute TAM, with TD Cowen lifting its target to $80. Most of the order news clustered late May to mid-June; orders up 57% YoY. Stock +17% since June 9 (now consensus-tracked as an 'under-the-radar AI' name).

sources.label: Cohu lands 2nd AI chip test order, $65-80M HPC (StockTitan)
Bull case for Cohu following upgraded HPC outlook (Simply Wall St)
Cohu's AI test gear winning orders (Finimize)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the AI-node bottleneck map, a fresh second multi-unit AI-chip test order plus raised $80-100M HPC outlook is a real datapoint - the order/regulatory catalyst the prior June 9 hold said was absent. Modest given low absolute relevance of test/WFE to the core node bottleneck.
verdicts.bull: AI/HPC test orders up 57% YoY; raised HPC guide; KGD/HBM/CPO test intensity rising.
verdicts.neutral: Test gear is a derivative, late-cycle bottleneck node; orders lumpy.
verdicts.bear: Small absolute HPC revenue; export-control and order-timing risk on a low-relevance node.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Second AI-chip test order + HPC guide raise

verdicts.rankRationale: Crowding-sensitive lens already penalized this name down to 22 on discovery. Fresh AI orders/guide raise are a small positive offset, but +161% YTD and price through most raised $80 targets keep residual asymmetry thin - net near-neutral.
verdicts.bull: AI/HPC test design wins validate the theme; recurring revenue mix ~60%.
verdicts.neutral: Genuine orders but discovery phase largely complete; targets met.
verdicts.bear: Crowded after +161% YTD; single-bundle validation risk; price near consensus.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the test-time-scaling verification-layer lens, the second AI-chip test order and raised HPC outlook reinforce Cohu's role as the verification gear for scaled chip manufacturing - a modest fundamental positive supporting its strong rank 4.
verdicts.bull: Verification layer for AI chip manufacturing scaling; fresh AI test orders, raised HPC TAM.
verdicts.neutral: Cyclical equipment exposure; orders can be lumpy quarter to quarter.
verdicts.bear: Small cap at +161% YTD; profitability lags order wins ('orders, not profits yet').
